case_level_notes: Critical evidence (passport, CBP travel history, flight records, travel table) is missing; only an approximate narrative exists. Human review required to obtain exact travel dates before adjudicating continuous residence and physical presence.

determinations.rationale: Approximate seven-month absence in 2021 raises a potential continuous residence break (6+ months), but exact dates are missing to evaluate.
No exact travel dates, blank presence worksheet, and missing passport/CBP/flight records prevent calculation of physical presence days.
Case packet contains no information about state or USCIS district residence.
No facts provided about English ability or applicable exceptions.
No facts provided about civics knowledge or applicable exceptions.
No facts in the packet address oath or attachment to the Constitution.
No GMC-related facts are provided in the packet.
Missing critical travel dates, blank presence worksheet, and approximate ~7-month absence trigger benchmark human review for continuous residence and physical presence.
